support.title: Support Centre
support.subtitle: We're always here to help
support.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your problem in Hindi or English...
support.noTickets: You haven't created any tickets yet.
support.noTicketsFilter: No tickets found with these filters.
support.faq1q: When will I get the subsidy?
support.faq1a: Subsidy usually reaches your bank account 30-90 days after installation and net meter is installed. If it's been over 90 days, please create a support ticket.
support.faq2q: When should I get the panels cleaned?
support.faq2a: Get panels cleaned every 3-4 months. Cleaning is important after rains and before summer. AMC plan includes cleaning.
support.faq3q: Will solar work during power cut?
support.faq3a: In on-grid systems, solar stops when the grid is off (for safety). If you want backup, talk to us about hybrid systems.
support.faq4q: When will net meter be installed?
support.faq4a: After installation we apply to DISCOM. Net meter is usually installed in 15-30 days. Check status on your order page.
support.faq5a: Solar panels: 25-year performance warranty. Inverter: 5-10 years (by brand). Structure: 10 years. Warranty card is on your order page.
support.faq6a: Yes! We have 0% EMI for 6-12 months. Bank partners: SBI, PNB, Bajaj Finserv. Call: 9XX-XXX-XXXX.
support.commitmentDesc: We resolve all issues within 24-48 hours. Your solar system's performance is our priority.
support.noTicketsRaise: Create your first support request using the button above.
support.noMatchTry: Try changing your filters or search term.
